title: WIP: use cobra's autogenerated completions
body: Use cobra's autogenerated completion functions instead of our hand-rolled ones.

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 89bc2a6) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I think 71ba2e4ef0a762abf83035dedd35dbccbdcd983c got us a lot closer to making this a reality.
